occupation: President at ICAS Global Think Tank
headline: Chief Executive of UK’s Advertising Standards Authority. President of ICAS Global Think Tank. Board member of ICAS, EASA, Fundraising Regulator and CIISA.
summary: Experienced, strategic and innovative Chief Executive in regulation, driving organisational transformation, technological transformation and developing strong cultures. Experienced Chair/President and non-exec director.

experiences.title: President
experiences.description: ICAS' Global Think Tank tackling the big ad-regulatory questions of today and tomorrow.

experiences.title: Chief Executive
experiences.description: Leading an evidence-based regulator that follows the principles of good regulation; delivering strategic, cultural and operational change in a changing societal and, particularly, technological, context; and operating in a complex stakeholder environment, working with consumer groups, industry, politicians, civil society and statutory regulators like Ofcom, with whom the ASA has a co-regulatory relationship.

experiences.title: Standards Committee member
experiences.description: Committee reponsible for writing the Fundraising Code of Practice.

experiences.title: ICAS President
experiences.description: Global platform for effective ad self-regulation.

experiences.title: Board and Executive Committee Member
experiences.description: European voice of effective ad self-regulation.

education.description: Maths, Economics and Politics A Levels
